name: Triple Chocolate Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly melt butter and unsweetened chocolate.
2. In a separate bowl, blend sugar, eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Sift flour, salt, and baking soda together in another bowl.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture, mixing well.
5. Gradually add the chocolate mixture to the batter and blend until smooth.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips.
7. Grease muffin tins with butter or oil.
8. Fill each cup about 2/3 full with batter.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. These muffins are delicious served with cold milk.
